title: jurinea albicaulis subsp. kilaea
intro: Jurinea albicaulis subsp. kilaea is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is a perennial herb native to mountainous regions of the Mediterranean area, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jurinea albicaulis subsp. kilaea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
